title: polypodium aequale
intro: Polypodium aequale, also known as American polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, inflammation, and skin problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium aequale include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
